query: bash -c "source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && cd /mnt/c/civibbs/v2.5/lib/small/ml && for p in atomic_take atomic_write create_agent_mailbox create_multiple_topo_units create_public_mailbox create_topo_storage_with_copies resolve_mail_target send_shutdown_to_topo_unit wait_for_mail_arrival; do python3 -c \"import importlib.util, sys; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(\"t_\"+\"$p\", \"$p/execute.py\"); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); sys.modules[\"t_\"+\"$p\"] = mod; spec.loader.exec_module(mod); print(\"  ok: $p\")\" 2>&1 || echo \"  FAIL: $p\"; done"
